name: FIBROVASCULAR POLYP OF ESOPHAGUS
definition: HAMARTOMA = LIPOMA = FIBROMA = FIBROLIPOMA = FIBROMYXOMA = FIBROEPITHELIAL POLYP intraluminal esophageal polyp

demographics.Path: elongated intraluminal mass of fibrous + adipose tissue of varying proportions covered
demographics.Size: 7 cm long at time of presentation extending inferiorly as far as into the stomach

dominant_finding: heterogeneous mass with areas of soft-tissue and fat attenuation
discriminating_features: giant sausage-shaped intraluminal mass originating from cervical esophagus (pedicle
heterogeneous mass with areas of soft-tissue and fat attenuation

general: giant sausage-shaped intraluminal mass originating from cervical esophagus (pedicle
heterogeneous mass with areas of soft-tissue and fat attenuation

clinical.Cx: asphyxia + sudden death ← after regurgitation of polyp into pharynx / mouth
